name.description: Shared counter key; expectations with the same name share one rate-limit counter. When omitted the expectation id is used as the key

limit.description: fixed_window: maximum requests allowed per window before requests are rejected

refillPerSecond.description: token_bucket: token refill rate per second

errorStatus.description: Status returned when the request is over-limit (default 429)

retryAfter.description: Literal Retry-After header value; when omitted it is computed from the window/bucket reset time
